components.name: accordion
components.description: Vertically stacked, collapsible content sections

meta.name: Accordion
meta.description: Vertically stacked, collapsible content sections

components.name: alert
components.description: Highlights a short, important message inline

meta.name: Alert
meta.description: Highlights a short, important message inline

examples.title: Info
examples.code: <Alert variant="info" title="Heads up">Your trial ends soon.</Alert>

examples.title: Actionable
examples.code: <Alert variant="warning" title="Update available" action={{ label: 'Update now', onClick: update }}>A new version is ready.</Alert>

components.name: avatar
components.description: Displays a user image with initials fallback

meta.name: Avatar
meta.description: Displays a user image with initials fallback

props.name: fallback
props.description: Initials shown when no image is available

components.name: badge
components.description: Small status label or category indicator

meta.name: Badge
meta.description: Small status label or category indicator

components.name: breadcrumb
components.description: Shows the current page location within a navigation hierarchy

meta.name: Breadcrumb
meta.description: Shows the current page location within a navigation hierarchy

props.name: maxVisible
props.description: When items exceed this count, collapse to the first item, an ellipsis, and the trailing items

examples.title: Basic
examples.code: <Breadcrumb items={[{ label: 'Home', href: '/' }, { label: 'Docs', href: '/docs' }, { label: 'Breadcrumb' }]} />

examples.title: Collapsed
examples.code: <Breadcrumb maxVisible={3} items={[{ label: 'Home', href: '/' }, { label: 'Docs', href: '/docs' }, { label: 'Components', href: '/docs/components' }, { label: 'Breadcrumb' }]} />
examples.description: Long trails collapse to the first item, an ellipsis, and the trailing items.

components.name: button
components.description: Triggers an action or event

meta.name: Button
meta.description: Triggers an action or event

components.name: card
components.description: Container for grouping related content

meta.name: Card
meta.description: Container for grouping related content

components.name: checkbox
components.description: Binary toggle for forms, with indeterminate support

meta.name: Checkbox
meta.description: Binary toggle for forms, with indeterminate support

components.name: combobox
components.description: Filterable single-select with an animated custom listbox, built on the dropdown open/close machine

meta.name: Combobox
meta.description: Filterable single-select with an animated custom listbox, built on the dropdown open/close machine

examples.title: Basic combobox
examples.code:
<Combobox
  label="Country"
  options={[
    { value: 'us', label: 'United States' },
    { value: 'de', label: 'Germany' },
    { value: 'fr', label: 'France' },
  ]}
  onChange={(value) => console.log(value)}
/>

components.name: command-menu
components.description: Cmd+K command palette with fuzzy search over grouped commands

meta.name: CommandMenu
meta.description: Cmd+K command palette with fuzzy search over grouped commands

props.name: hotkey
props.description: Global Cmd/Ctrl+K toggles the menu via onOpenChange

props.name: loading
props.description: Shows a loading spinner in place of the empty state (for async items)

props.name: onQueryChange
props.description: Fires on every query keystroke — use to fetch async items

examples.title: Basic command menu
examples.code:
<CommandMenu
  open={open}
  onOpenChange={setOpen}
  groups={[
    {
      heading: 'Actions',
      items: [
        { id: 'new', label: 'New file', shortcut: ['⌘', 'N'], onSelect: createFile },
        { id: 'search', label: 'Search docs', keywords: ['find'], onSelect: openSearch },
      ],
    },
  ]}
/>

components.name: data-table
components.description: Signal-driven data table with client/server sort, filter, pagination, multi-selection, expandable rows, and CSS content-visibility row containment for large datasets

meta.name: DataTable
meta.description: Signal-driven data table with client/server sort, filter, pagination, multi-selection, expandable rows, and CSS content-visibility row containment for large datasets

props.name: selection
props.type: { mode: 'single' | 'multi'; selected?: string[]; onChange?: (ids: string[]) => void }

examples.title: Basic table
examples.code:
<DataTable
  columns={[
    { key: 'name', header: 'Name', sortable: true },
    { key: 'role', header: 'Role' },
  ]}
  rows={[
    { name: 'Alice', role: 'Engineer' },
    { name: 'Bob', role: 'Designer' },
  ]}
  getRowId={(r) => r.name}
/>

examples.title: Full-featured: selection, pagination, search
examples.code:
<DataTable
  columns={columns}
  rows={rows}
  getRowId={(r) => r.id}
  searchable
  pagination={{ pageSize: 10, pageSizeOptions: [10, 25, 50] }}
  selection={{ mode: 'multi', onChange: setSelected }}
  batchActions={[{ label: 'Delete', onClick: deleteRows }]}
  stickyHeader
  zebra
/>

components.name: date-picker
components.description: An accessible date-picker with a calendar popover.

meta.name: DatePicker
meta.description: An accessible date-picker with a calendar popover.

props.description: Called on date selection or clear

components.description: Menu of actions revealed from a trigger

props.name: items
props.type: { label: string; value: string; icon?: ReactNode; disabled?: boolean; separator?: boolean }[]

components.name: empty-state
components.description: Placeholder for views that have no data to display

meta.name: EmptyState
meta.description: Placeholder for views that have no data to display

examples.title: Basic
examples.code: <EmptyState title="No results" description="Try adjusting your filters." />

examples.title: With action
examples.code: <EmptyState icon="📄" title="No documents yet" description="Create your first document to get started." action={<Button>New document</Button>} />

props.name: onRemove

props.name: hint

components.name: header

meta.description: App top bar with brand, primary navigation links, and an actions slot

props.name: brand
props.description: Product name or logo area, typically wraps a link

props.name: links
props.type: { label: string; href: string; active?: boolean }[]
props.description: Primary navigation links; active link gets aria-current="page"

props.name: actions
props.description: Right-aligned slot for buttons or an avatar

components.description: Text input field with optional label, hint, and error state

meta.name: Input
meta.description: Text input field with optional label, hint, and error state

meta.description: Displays a keyboard key or shortcut

examples.title: Shortcut
examples.description: Compose multiple keys to show a shortcut

components.name: link
components.description: Styled anchor for navigation, standalone or inline within prose

meta.description: Styled anchor for navigation, standalone or inline within prose

examples.title: Inline
examples.description: Inline links inherit the surrounding font size and stay underlined.

examples.title: External
examples.description: Opens in a new tab with rel="noreferrer" and a visual indicator.

components.name: modal
components.description: Accessible dialog overlay using native <dialog> element

meta.name: Modal
meta.description: Accessible dialog overlay using native <dialog> element

examples.title: Basic modal
examples.code:
setIsOpen(false)} title="Confirm action">

Are you sure?

components.name: number-input
components.description: Numeric input with stepper buttons, clamping, precision, and locale formatting

meta.name: NumberInput
meta.description: Numeric input with stepper buttons, clamping, precision, and locale formatting

props.name: onChange
props.description: Fired on commit (blur, Enter, stepping); null when empty or unparseable

props.name: formatOptions
props.description: Display formatting applied on blur; raw editable string while focused

components.name: overflow-menu
components.description: Kebab icon button revealing a menu of row-level actions

meta.name: OverflowMenu
meta.description: Kebab icon button revealing a menu of row-level actions

props.name: items
props.type: { label: string; value: string; icon?: ReactNode; disabled?: boolean; destructive?: boolean }[]

examples.title: Row actions
examples.code: <OverflowMenu items={[{ label: "Edit", value: "edit" }, { label: "Delete", value: "delete", destructive: true }]} onSelect={handle} />

components.name: pagination
components.description: Controls for navigating paged data sets, with page size selection

meta.name: Pagination
meta.description: Controls for navigating paged data sets, with page size selection

props.name: pageSizeOptions
props.description: Options for the page size select

props.name: labels
props.description: Overridable English strings for all visible and accessible text

examples.title: Custom labels
examples.code: <Pagination page={1} pageSize={10} totalItems={42} onPageChange={setPage} labels={{ previous: 'Zurück', next: 'Weiter' }} />

components.name: progress-bar
components.description: Shows determinate or indeterminate progress of a task

meta.name: ProgressBar
meta.description: Shows determinate or indeterminate progress of a task

props.name: value
props.description: Current value from 0 to max; omit for an indeterminate bar

props.name: label
props.description: Visible label above the track, wired via aria-labelledby

props.name: status
props.description: success/error tint the fill and show a glyph next to the label

components.name: progress-indicator
components.description: Shows progress through the steps of a multi-step flow

meta.name: ProgressIndicator
meta.description: Shows progress through the steps of a multi-step flow

examples.title: Vertical with descriptions
examples.code: <ProgressIndicator vertical steps={[{ label: 'Account', description: 'Your details' }, { label: 'Confirm' }]} currentIndex={0} />

components.name: radio
components.description: Single choice from a set, grouped with RadioGroup

meta.name: Radio
meta.description: Single choice from a set, grouped with RadioGroup

examples.title: Group
examples.code: <RadioGroup name="plan" defaultValue="pro"><Radio value="pro" label="Pro" /><Radio value="team" label="Team" /></RadioGroup>

props.description: When true, the separator is purely visual and hidden from assistive tech
